meaning: n.[药]乌洛托品,环六亚甲基四胺(尿路灭菌药)
examples: It features its detergent being edible hydrochloric acid and its corrosion inhibitor comprising urotropine, thiocyanate and thiourea.
BET and SEM techniques were used to study the influence of pore expanding agents (urotropine and urea) on properties of the carriers for automotive catalysts.
This paper presents the studies on the reaction form of urea or nitrourea which condenses with nitrolysis fragments of urotropine to form Keto RDX in nitrating agents.
